sections.name: Responsory4
lines: R. Peter, do you love me? Lord, You know that I love you.
* Feed my sheep.
V. Simon, son of Jonas, do love you me more than these? Lord, you know that I love you.
R. Feed my sheep.

sections.name: Lectio6
lines: @Sancti/06-29:Lectio5:s/Thou .*//s

sections.name: Lectio7
lines: @Sancti/06-29:Lectio5:s/.* (Thou )/$1/s s/$/~/
@Sancti/06-29:Lectio6:s/But .*//s

sections.name: Lectio8
lines: @Sancti/06-29:Lectio6:s/.* (But this)/$1/s

sections.name: Responsory8
lines: R. Loose the fetters of the earth O Peter at the command of God.
* You who open the kingdom of heaven to the blessed.
V. Whatsœver you shall bind upon earth, it shall be bound also in heaven: and whatsœver you shall loose on earth, it shall be loosed also in heaven.
R. You who open the kingdom of heaven to the blessed.

sections.name: Lectio10
lines: @Sancti/06-29:Lectio8:s/And .*//s

sections.name: Lectio11
lines: @Sancti/06-29:Lectio8:s/.* (And )/$1/s s/$/~/
@Sancti/06-29:Lectio9:s/What .*//s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. And I will give to you the keys and hand over care of the flock,
* He who committed heaven and earth to Peter, to open that which is shut and to loose what is bound.
V. He himself gave you the power O Peter to loosen the chains which bind together those ruled by worldly things.
R. He who he committed heaven and earth to Peter, to open that which is shut and to loose what is bound.

sections.name: Lectio12
lines: @Sancti/06-29:Lectio9:s/.* (What )/$1/s

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. Blessed are you, Simon Bar-Jona: because flesh and blood has not revealed it to you, but my Father who is in heaven.
* Says the Lord.
V. And I say to you: that you are Peter; and upon this rock I will build my church.
R. Says the Lord.
